title: Legacy Archive Planner
target_user: Adults managing aging parents' digital assets
problem_or_desire: Difficulty organizing and securing digital credentials and sentimental files for inheritance.
core_concept: A secure, encrypted digital vault with automated release triggers.
proposed_approach: A web interface that guides users through a checklist of digital assets and sets up multi-factor verification for designated heirs.
prototype_scope: A secure form-based input system that generates a downloadable encrypted PDF manifest.

title: Arboretum Architect
target_user: Urban professionals feeling disconnected from nature
problem_or_desire: Lack of calming mental stimulation during public transit commutes
core_concept: Slow-paced horticultural design where trees grow in real-time synchronization with sunlight exposure in the player's zip code.
proposed_approach: Integrate local meteorological and astronomical APIs to dictate plant growth patterns, incentivizing small adjustments to virtual plots throughout the day.
prototype_scope: Single desert garden biome where user can plant one cactus and observe sun-path light-tracking simulations over a 48-hour period.

title: Pop-up Restaurant Exchange
problem_or_desire: High overhead costs for restaurants during off-peak hours.
core_concept: A platform that matches daytime-only cafes with evening-only pop-up chefs.
proposed_approach: Facilitate short-term lease agreements and insurance coverage for evening kitchen usage.
prototype_scope: One cafe hosting three different pop-up chefs over three consecutive weekends.

title: Virtual Co-working Accountability Partner
problem_or_desire: Lack of structure and social pressure to complete daily tasks
core_concept: A platform that pairs users for 90-minute silent, video-on co-working sessions
proposed_approach: Automated scheduling and pairing based on time zones and task types
prototype_scope: A simple scheduling calendar that pairs two users for a Zoom session

title: Substack Monetization Audits
problem_or_desire: Creators struggling to convert free subscribers into paid members
core_concept: A structured 10-point audit framework specifically for Substack pricing page conversion.
proposed_approach: A specialized consulting service providing a standardized 10-point audit of Substack landing pages to improve conversion rates.
prototype_scope: Perform 10 manual audits for free in exchange for testimonials and case studies. | Define the 10-point audit criteria.; Identify 20 potential Substack creators.; Conduct 10 audits via Loom video.; Collect feedback and conversion data.

title: SyllabusSwap
problem_or_desire: Finding open-source creative examples for repetitive academic assignment prompts
core_concept: Searchable registry of verified academic supplemental material
proposed_approach: Gamified metadata tagging for faculty members to recommend specific outside readings for specific syllabus modules
prototype_scope: Directory of three dummy course modules where items can be liked, sorted, and suggested via form submission

title: Vendor Dispute Navigator
problem_or_desire: Reconciling billing discrepancies with disparate cloud service vendors.
core_concept: Automated cross-referencing of usage logs against invoice line items to identify discrepancies.
proposed_approach: A diagnostic tool that ingests PDF invoices and CSV usage reports to highlight mathematical mismatches for human review.
prototype_scope: A Python script that parses three specific SaaS billing formats and generates a CSV report of flagged discrepancies. | Define schema for three target SaaS billing formats; Develop regex-based invoice parser; Build comparison logic for usage vs. billing; Create output report generator

title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
core_concept: Ranking candidates based on public technical content production.
proposed_approach: A tool that scrapes public contribution histories and grades them based on a predefined rubric.
prototype_scope: A script that takes a GitHub/StackOverflow profile and outputs a score based on frequency and complexity of contributions. | Define scoring rubric; Build scraper for one platform; Implement scoring logic; Create simple report

title: Institutional Waste Conversion Catering
problem_or_desire: Requirement to serve ethical, low-impact high-quality group catering
core_concept: Meals prepared exclusively from 'ugly' or near-expiry restaurant bulk raw materials
proposed_approach: Maintain partnerships with high-end food distributors to repurpose unpicked perfectly edible industrial excess
prototype_scope: Catering 5 lunches for one specific office office environment focusing on total reduction of carbon-spend data collection

title: SEO Decay Alert System
problem_or_desire: Losing existing traffic revenue to un-indexed updates in Google search result pages
core_concept: Threshold alerts for SEO rank fluctuations.
proposed_approach: A monitoring service that alerts content creators when specific pages experience significant rank drops, prompting manual review.
prototype_scope: A simple script or manual check that emails users when rank drops below a threshold. | Set up rank tracking for 5 sites.; Define alert thresholds.; Send manual alerts for 30 days.; Gather feedback on utility.

title: Community Moderation Firewall
target_user: Slack-hosted or Discord-hosted digital service communities
problem_or_desire: Managing community quality during organic spikes of paid users joining chat rooms
core_concept: Threshold filtering allowing new user interactions after passing specific introductory checklist requirements
proposed_approach: Gated room architecture that auto-clears users as members provide identity verification/intro requirements
prototype_scope: Set of manual invite workflow gate protocols installed for three specific private Discord communities

title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
core_concept: Autonomous social reading and contribution analysis, focused solely on long-form public content authored by candidates.
proposed_approach: Ranking candidate 'mindshare' via analysis of high-depth technical content production on community forums as opposed to resumes.
prototype_scope: Limited to scraping and grading public contribution histories for one job description on one coding community forum.

title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
core_concept: Rapid-response modular machine heart swaps and standardized component library to reduce technical failure periods
proposed_approach: Aggregator of independent master electricians trained in industry equipment, utilizing modular chassis exchange rather than deep in-store diagnostics
prototype_scope: Testing speed-to-solution with five broken commercial devices by delivering serviced, reconditioned replacement module parts

title: Sales Lead Qualifier Agent
problem_or_desire: Wasted time on unqualified leads that do not fit the ideal customer profile.
core_concept: An agent that performs deep research on incoming leads by analyzing public digital footprints and company data.
proposed_approach: Automated web-scraping and data synthesis to score leads based on predefined firmographic criteria.
prototype_scope: A tool that takes a list of 20 LinkedIn profiles and returns a 'qualified' or 'unqualified' status with a one-sentence justification.

title: User-Generated Video Repository
problem_or_desire: Inability to find or license high-quality, authentic smartphone unboxing footage
core_concept: A direct procurement bridge for authentic consumer video assets.
proposed_approach: A curated community connecting D2C brands with creators for authentic unboxing and product usage videos.
prototype_scope: A closed Slack group vetting 20 creators and 20 brands. | Recruit 20 creators.; Recruit 20 brands.; Facilitate connections in Slack.; Monitor quality of output.

title: Vertical Hyper-Growth Greens Box
target_user: Small households living without access to light
problem_or_desire: Fresh, raw herbs losing structural viability within days of shop delivery
core_concept: Live, harvestable herbs in the kitchen.
proposed_approach: A subscription for pre-grown, potted herbs that are replaced weekly.
prototype_scope: Deliver 20 potted herbs to 15 kitchens and replace them weekly for one month. | Source 20 potted herbs; Recruit 15 households; Execute weekly delivery/replacement; Measure herb survival and user satisfaction

title: Low-Acid Caffeine Concierge
problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in non-irritating, laboratory-tested gentle preparation methods in cafe environments
proposed_approach: Sub-sampling subscription offering batch-certified low-acid coffee beans screened for standardized PH levels
prototype_scope: A pH-measuring toolkit distributed to participants to gather subjective reaction data vs objectively measured laboratory acidity

title: Inventory Equilibrium Scout
problem_or_desire: Balancing low inventory costs with delivery lead time requirements across geographic regions.
core_concept: Self-modifying replenishment rules based on localized shipping cost fluctuations.
proposed_approach: Connecting historical fulfillment throughput with carrier pricing scrapers to update ERP buffer stocks automatically.
prototype_scope: Agent capable of updating buffer stock values in one simulated cloud-based inventory system.

title: Inter-App Knowledge Scavenger
problem_or_desire: Duplicate information creation where project context is scattered between messenger apps and whiteboard collaboration tools.
core_concept: Summarizing chat discussions and linking them to project management tickets.
proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to select chat messages and push them as comments to a project management ticket.
prototype_scope: A Slack/Teams bot that lets users click a 'save to ticket' button on a message. | Build chat bot integration; Implement ticket API connection; Create 'save' action; Test with one PM tool

title: Senior Nutrition Concierge
problem_or_desire: Difficulty preparing balanced meals that meet specific medical dietary needs.
core_concept: A personalized meal delivery service managed by a registered dietitian.
proposed_approach: Consultations to create a meal plan that is then prepared by a local kitchen and delivered daily.
prototype_scope: A pilot with five seniors receiving customized meals for two weeks.

title: Regulatory Change Response Architect
target_user: Food and beverage quality assurance heads
problem_or_desire: Drastic differences in health safety manual implementation when regulations shift locally.
core_concept: Mapping new legislation changes to existing internal standard operating procedure documents using diff identification.
proposed_approach: Monitoring governmental regulatory feeds for trigger keywords and automatically highlighting modified procedure steps for policy-drafter human rewrite.
prototype_scope: Dashboard tool for monitoring two specific municipality codes impacting packaging labeling.

title: Ingredient-First Meal Kits
target_user: Home cooks with specific dietary restrictions
problem_or_desire: Meal kits often contain excessive packaging and pre-processed sauces.
core_concept: A subscription service providing only the raw, hard-to-source specialty ingredients for a recipe.
proposed_approach: Source high-quality, bulk-packaged specialty items and provide digital recipe cards for the remaining pantry staples.
prototype_scope: A subscription box for one specific cuisine (e.g., authentic Thai) delivered to 20 local households.

title: Institutional Compost Loyalty Loop
problem_or_desire: High workplace organic waste volume with no benefit or impact reflection
core_concept: Closing the loop on office coffee waste by returning composted material to the office environment.
proposed_approach: A closed-loop service that collects office coffee grounds and delivers finished compost from a local partner to the office's indoor/outdoor plants.
prototype_scope: A pilot with 3 offices using a local community garden partner to process grounds and return finished compost. | Identify 3 offices with plant maintenance needs.; Partner with a local community garden for composting.; Establish a weekly bucket exchange schedule.

title: Content Localization Agent
problem_or_desire: High cost and slow turnaround for adapting marketing copy for different cultural and linguistic markets.
core_concept: An agent that adapts brand voice and cultural nuances in marketing copy rather than performing literal translation.
proposed_approach: Fine-tuned LLM prompts that incorporate brand style guides and regional cultural context.
prototype_scope: A tool that takes one English blog post and generates three localized versions for different regions with distinct tone adjustments.

title: Digital Asset Legacy Planner
problem_or_desire: Ensuring digital assets are accessible to heirs after death
core_concept: A secure, time-locked digital vault that releases access credentials to designated beneficiaries
proposed_approach: A dead-man's switch mechanism that triggers notification and release after a period of inactivity
prototype_scope: A basic web interface that allows users to store encrypted text and set a trigger date

title: Regulatory Change Response Architect
target_user: Food and beverage quality assurance heads
problem_or_desire: Drastic differences in health safety manual implementation when regulations shift locally.
core_concept: Mapping regulatory changes to internal SOPs using diff identification.
proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to upload new regulations and existing SOPs, then highlights potential areas of conflict.
prototype_scope: A web tool where users paste text from a regulation and an SOP, and the tool highlights keywords that appear in both. | Define keyword mapping; Build text comparison engine; Create simple UI; Test with sample regulations

title: Community Tool Library
problem_or_desire: Lack of storage space for infrequently used tools and appliances.
core_concept: A neighborhood-based lending platform for household items.
proposed_approach: A web app that manages inventory, availability, and lending status for a closed group of neighbors.
prototype_scope: A simple list view of available items with a 'request to borrow' button.

title: Low-Acid Caffeine Concierge
problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in non-irritating, laboratory-tested gentle preparation methods in cafe environments
core_concept: Personalized coffee selection based on individual sensitivity to acidity.
proposed_approach: A subscription service that curates beans known for low-acidity profiles and provides a simple pH test kit for users to track their own reactions.
prototype_scope: A 10-person pilot using existing low-acid bean varieties and a basic pH strip kit to gather subjective feedback. | Source 3 known low-acid coffee varieties.; Recruit 10 participants with known sensitivities.; Distribute coffee and pH test strips for a 2-week trial.

title: Vendor Dispute Navigator
problem_or_desire: Reconciling billing discrepancies with disparate cloud service vendors.
core_concept: An agent that autonomously cross-references service usage logs against line-item invoices.
proposed_approach: The agent extracts data from emailed invoices and uses API-accessible usage reports to flag potential overcharges for human review.
prototype_scope: Support for exactly three major SaaS billing platforms processing synthetic email data.

title: Mind Mapping Mycology
target_user: Project managers needing mental organizational structure
problem_or_desire: Hard-to-track complex logical connections between project silos
core_concept: Isometric management simulation where project nodes propagate resources.
proposed_approach: An isometric management game where project nodes are connected, and players must manage resource flow between them.
prototype_scope: A visualization engine displaying connections between one parent and three child entities. | Design isometric node system; Implement resource flow logic; Build simple UI for node management

title: Echo Archive
target_user: History buffs and collaborative world builders
problem_or_desire: Disconnected storytelling platforms for regional historical facts
core_concept: Location-based storytelling that overlays historical narratives onto modern landscapes.
proposed_approach: A location-based app that triggers audio clips when a user reaches specific, pre-defined coordinates in a city.
prototype_scope: A single city square map with one tethered narrative mission triggered by GPS proximity. | Implement basic GPS geofencing; Record and integrate one audio narrative; Build simple map interface

title: StudioPulse
problem_or_desire: Difficulty calculating the correct time allowance for revisions vs. design production
core_concept: Predictive duration simulator based on style complexity benchmarks
proposed_approach: Questionnaire interface that asks users to input dimensions, density of elements, and file type requirements
prototype_scope: An interactive form calculating an estimated project hour count based on toggle choices of design project type

title: Community-Led Product Feedback Loop

core_concept: A platform that incentivizes community members to perform specific usability tests

prototype_scope: A Google Form-based system that connects testers with product links

title: Micro-batch Kitchens for Allergens
problem_or_desire: Anxiety around cross-contamination in communal food spaces

prototype_scope: Prepare 3 allergen-free meals for 5 users, providing a recorded video of the assembly process for each. | Define strict allergen-free protocols; Set up recording station; Prepare 15 meals with video proof; Gather feedback on trust levels

title: BotanicTrack
problem_or_desire: Difficulty tracking plant growth performance compared to recommended care
core_concept: Visualization-heavy comparison interface between 'optimal' vs. 'attained' progress steps
proposed_approach: Data-heavy tracking focused solely on height metrics over fixed duration time intervals
prototype_scope: Form fields for recording plant dimensions weekly, displaying line graphs against ideal biological grow trajectories

title: Polyglot Plaza
problem_or_desire: Low retention rates caused by repetitive and dry grammar exercises

proposed_approach: A single-player text-based adventure where players must translate simple phrases to trade items with static NPCs.
prototype_scope: A market vendor scene with one bartering minigame requiring translation of three specific phrases. | Design three simple bartering scenarios; Implement basic text input and validation logic; Create static NPC dialogue trees

title: Syntax Storm
target_user: Developers working on clean code focus
problem_or_desire: High mental fatigue during weekend learning periods
core_concept: Combat strategy built entirely on cleaning buggy snippets, represented as infected territory grids.
proposed_approach: Applying real regex principles as combat commands, effectively treating syntax repair as real-time defensive fortification building.
prototype_scope: One combat grid that rewards valid syntax string repair of two predefined erroneous input segments.

title: Micro-SaaS Acquisition Brokerage
target_user: Developers looking to sell small, profitable web tools

core_concept: A specialized brokerage service for very small digital assets

title: Shadow Script
problem_or_desire: Stalled imagination due to lack of character stakes
core_concept: Reverse Choose-Your-Own-Adventure where the player creates obstacles for an AI.

prototype_scope: Two scripted chapters with one 'conflict injection' scene that branches into two possible outcomes. | Write two chapters and two outcomes; Implement basic branching logic; Build simple UI for choice selection

title: Coffee Bean Upcycling Kit
problem_or_desire: Guilt over the volume of spent coffee grounds generated daily
core_concept: A subscription service that collects spent grounds and provides pre-measured additives to convert them into garden fertilizer or exfoliating scrubs
proposed_approach: Provide compostable collection bins and monthly pickup/conversion kits
prototype_scope: A 30-day pilot with 15 households to test collection logistics

title: Tech Stacks Lifecycle Steward
problem_or_desire: Underutilized 'seat licenses' contributing to phantom software spending.
core_concept: Continuous entitlement auditing via automated API connection to single sign-on access logs.
proposed_approach: Periodic cross-comparison of user access timestamps against user seating assignment lists, highlighting license retirement recommendations.
prototype_scope: Script that performs a one-time automated scan of two disparate identity management SaaS platform usage records.

title: Personalized Traceability Identity (TI)
problem_or_desire: Lack of granular detail connecting payment to specific farmer/crop outcomes in mainstream coffee service channels
core_concept: Banking interface enabling customers to link their loyalty point spend directly to local agricultural school endowments
proposed_approach: Transaction routing through blockchain smart-contracts to transparently distribute surplus margins to individual coffee harvesters mentioned on labeling
prototype_scope: Ten-person feedback session simulated via a manual dashboard mapping donations to localized, known agricultural beneficiaries

title: Multi-Channel Feedback Resolver
problem_or_desire: Rapid identification of recurring regional training lapses reported in informal channels.
core_concept: Parsing and normalizing sentiment trends across messy Yelp reviews, physical location comment cards, and SMS responses.
proposed_approach: An aggregation engine detects semantic trends indicating training issues and issues digest reports specifically for site managers.
prototype_scope: Input normalization agent for two disparate survey feedback databases focused purely on categorization performance.

title: Syntax Storm
target_user: Developers working on clean code focus
problem_or_desire: High mental fatigue during weekend learning periods
core_concept: Combat strategy built on cleaning buggy code snippets.
proposed_approach: A puzzle game where players fix buggy code snippets to defeat enemies in a grid-based combat system.
prototype_scope: One combat grid that rewards valid syntax string repair of two predefined erroneous input segments. | Design two buggy code snippets; Implement basic grid combat logic; Build simple UI for code repair

title: Synchronized Stride
problem_or_desire: Maintaining social connection through shared physical activity
core_concept: A cooperative platformer where two players must walk at the same pace to keep their characters moving
proposed_approach: Use accelerometer data to sync movement speed between two remote devices
prototype_scope: A simple 2D platformer level where character movement is locked until both devices detect matching step cadences

title: Collaborative Cold-Brew Barista Collective
problem_or_desire: Long transit waiting times leading to inconsistent coffee intake due to unpredictable cafe wait times
core_concept: On-transit cold brew access optimized for commuter traffic patterns.
proposed_approach: A mobile cold-brew cart stationed at a high-traffic commuter location, with inventory adjusted based on manual observation of train schedules.
prototype_scope: A single mobile cart at one transit hub for 1 week, tracking sales against train arrival times. | Secure permit for one transit hub location.; Operate a mobile cart for 5 days.; Record sales volume vs train arrival times.

title: Multi-Channel Feedback Resolver
problem_or_desire: Rapid identification of recurring regional training lapses reported in informal channels.
core_concept: Aggregating and categorizing feedback from disparate sources to identify training lapses.
proposed_approach: A tool that categorizes feedback into predefined buckets to help managers spot trends.
prototype_scope: A dashboard that ingests feedback from two sources and displays a categorized frequency chart. | Define feedback categories; Build ingestion for two sources; Implement categorization logic; Create dashboard

title: Botanical Bio-Feedback
problem_or_desire: Need for quick, calming mental breaks
core_concept: A virtual garden that grows based on the user's heart rate variability
proposed_approach: Integrate with mobile camera sensors to measure pulse via fingertip contact to influence plant growth speed
prototype_scope: A single plant model that changes color and size based on a simulated heart rate input

title: Event Schedule Peacekeeper
target_user: Chief of Staff to growing leadership teams
problem_or_desire: Managing individual goal priorities within restricted master organizational capacity plans.
core_concept: Constraint-based scheduling that prioritizes project milestones over availability.
proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to define 'critical blocks' and suggests rescheduling based on project milestones.
prototype_scope: A calendar plugin that lets users tag meetings as 'milestone-critical' and suggests moving non-critical meetings if conflicts arise. | Define milestone-critical tags; Build calendar API integration; Implement conflict detection; Create suggestion engine

title: LegacyLeaf
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in contextualizing old digitized family photos with metadata
core_concept: Chronological storytelling grid for digital archives.
proposed_approach: A simple drag-and-drop interface for arranging photos on a timeline with user-defined text labels.
prototype_scope: A web interface allowing 10 image uploads and manual chronological ordering. | Build image upload functionality; Implement drag-and-drop sorting; Add text annotation fields for each image

title: Pantry Potioneer
target_user: Home cooks trying to minimize food waste
problem_or_desire: Managing quickly expiring ingredients that end up in the trash
core_concept: RPG fantasy loop where inventory management is tied to real-world pantry items.
proposed_approach: An RPG where players manually input their pantry items to gain equipment traits for a fantasy battle.
prototype_scope: An inventory screen where users select from ten basic produce items to assign offensive ability slots. | Design ten produce items and their traits; Implement manual inventory selection UI; Build simple battle loop

title: Eco-System Balancer
problem_or_desire: Understanding complex ecological cause-and-effect relationships
core_concept: A simulation game where players manage a micro-ecosystem and must balance resource consumption against population growth
proposed_approach: System dynamics modeling where every action has a delayed, cascading impact on the virtual environment
prototype_scope: A single simulation screen showing the population levels of three species and one resource slider

title: Institutional Compost Loyalty Loop
problem_or_desire: High workplace organic waste volume with no benefit or impact reflection
core_concept: Closing the loop on office grounds by returning enriched garden soil equivalents back to common spaces
proposed_approach: Pickup service providing reusable metal receptacles for spent coffee pucks; providing professional composting services and quarterly soil analytics
prototype_scope: Ten offices sharing a municipal processing pipeline with branded bucket exchange infrastructure

title: Cloud Scribes
target_user: Visual artists seeking cooperative abstract outlet
problem_or_desire: Digital art being solitary by design
core_concept: Cooperative drawing tool with forced constraints.
proposed_approach: A drawing app where two users must coordinate to create a single image, with one controlling line and the other controlling color.
prototype_scope: A two-user concurrent drawing interface demonstrating basic synchronization logic for one shared layer. | Implement basic drawing canvas; Build simple networking for two-user sync; Define line and color control roles

title: Sleep Sentinel
target_user: Light sleepers suffering from screen light overstimulation
problem_or_desire: Late night fidgeting and phone reliance impacting transition to REM cycles
core_concept: Audio-only tactical adventure navigable through binary haptic pulses and voice commands while keeping the eyes fully closed (phone screen brightness reduced to black).
proposed_approach: Binaural storytelling using spatial audio to indicate direction; user must verbally command left, right, or push maneuvers to solve escape puzzles while lying in darkness.
prototype_scope: Calibration of gyroscope-to-rotation mapping for selecting directions within a simple 3x3 audio maze.

title: GiftGuard
problem_or_desire: Losing track of birthdays, anniversary-gift history, and social relationship nuances
core_concept: Categorized gift tracking by relationship tier.
proposed_approach: A simple CRM for personal relationships to track gift history.
prototype_scope: A profile vault for contacts with gift history fields. | Build a contact list; Add fields for gift history; Implement a simple search/filter

title: SyllabusSwap
problem_or_desire: Finding open-source creative examples for repetitive academic assignment prompts
core_concept: Searchable registry of verified academic supplemental material.
proposed_approach: A curated directory where users can submit and view links to supplemental materials for specific course modules.
prototype_scope: A simple directory site with search and submission forms. | Create a database of 3 dummy course modules; Build a submission form for links; Implement a basic search/filter interface

title: Mobile Espresso Cart for Commuter Hubs
problem_or_desire: Long wait times at stationary coffee shops during morning rush hour
core_concept: A high-speed, pre-order-only mobile cart positioned at transit entry points
proposed_approach: App-based ordering with a 30-second pickup window at a designated transit stop
prototype_scope: One mobile cart at a single train station for one week

title: Corporate Coffee Wellness Program
target_user: HR departments focused on employee health
problem_or_desire: Excessive caffeine consumption leading to afternoon crashes
core_concept: A service that replaces high-caffeine office coffee with a rotating selection of low-caffeine, high-antioxidant coffee alternatives
proposed_approach: Supply management and educational signage about caffeine intake
prototype_scope: A one-month trial in one department of a mid-sized company

title: Echo Archive
target_user: History buffs and collaborative world builders
problem_or_desire: Disconnected storytelling platforms for regional historical facts
core_concept: GPS-located audio logs left by 'Ghosts' that require movement to a specific real-world coordinate to initiate narration.
proposed_approach: Location-based point-to-point traversal gameplay that overlays a local-history ghost narrative onto modern landscapes.
prototype_scope: Single city square map supporting one tethered narrative mission.

title: Dream Journal Dungeon
problem_or_desire: Difficulty remembering and organizing dream content
core_concept: A dungeon crawler where the layout and enemies are procedurally generated from text input of dream journals
proposed_approach: Use natural language processing to extract keywords from user-inputted text to determine dungeon themes and enemy types
prototype_scope: A text input field that generates a simple 2D room layout based on three keywords

title: LegacyLeaf
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in contextualizing old digitized family photos with metadata
core_concept: Chronological storytelling grid for digital archives
proposed_approach: Users pin photos to a virtual timeline populated with external major historical dates as anchor points
prototype_scope: Web interface where 10 image uploads can be arranged chronologically with editable text annotations per slot

title: AI Coffee Palette Auditor
problem_or_desire: Mismatch between generic inventory bean selection and local customer latent flavour preference data
core_concept: Analyzing customer waste patterns via bin monitoring combined with QR-scan-based beverage survey inputs to optimize shelf supply
proposed_approach: Aggregating digital intake metadata from specific location footfall into heat maps characterizing taste skew for future inventory orders
prototype_scope: Implementing one tablet kiosk feedback gatherer integrated with traditional POS output in a non-traditional coffee setting like a co-working shared area

title: SyncMyBoard
problem_or_desire: Mismatching players, times, and learning difficulty levels
core_concept: Profile matchmaking system optimized solely for complexity class requirements of game libraries
proposed_approach: Constraint matching where hosting users define acceptable game type metrics versus guest expertise filters
prototype_scope: Match creation form allowing search results filter based on complexity level and participant timezone matches

title: Vendor Selection Orchestrator
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in finding legitimate, non-spammy shipping and fulfillment partners
core_concept: A curated, private directory of vetted e-commerce fulfillment partners.
proposed_approach: A curated directory of vetted 3PL vendors for small e-commerce brands, focusing on reliability and transparency.
prototype_scope: A Google Sheets portal connecting 5 retailers to 3 vetted vendors. | Vet 3 reliable 3PL vendors.; Create a landing page/portal.; Onboard 5 retailers.; Facilitate introductions.

title: Sensory-Blind Catering Experiences
target_user: Office event organizers targeting high social engagement
problem_or_desire: Traditional group events often focus too heavily on conversation distractants over menu intentionality
core_concept: Focus on taste and texture through sensory deprivation.
proposed_approach: A curated tasting event where participants are blindfolded to focus on flavor profiles.
prototype_scope: Host one 20-person event with a blindfolded tasting menu. | Design a 6-course tasting menu; Recruit 20 participants; Host the event; Collect qualitative feedback

title: Local Supply Chain Mapper
problem_or_desire: Inefficiency in sourcing seasonal ingredients from multiple local farms.
core_concept: A centralized procurement dashboard for local farm inventory.
proposed_approach: A web app that aggregates inventory lists from local producers into a single ordering interface for chefs.
prototype_scope: A static inventory view for three local farms and a simple email-based order submission button.

title: Inter-App Knowledge Scavenger
problem_or_desire: Duplicate information creation where project context is scattered between messenger apps and whiteboard collaboration tools.
core_concept: Bi-directional linkage building between synchronous communications and asynchronous document stores through contextual tagging.
proposed_approach: Running as an background process, the agent creates summary snippets of messenger discussions, placing them into current projects in management folders.
prototype_scope: Connecting one real-time chat platform specifically to one project management ticketing system.

title: RepairRiddle
problem_or_desire: Vetting the legitimacy and relevancy of massive amounts of instructional media
core_concept: Annotation map on procedural image slices identifying likely trouble spots within the manufacturer schematics
proposed_approach: Guided hotspot selection overlaid on visual guides supplied to identify broken components visually
prototype_scope: Interaction of an exploded parts-view image enabling users to pin suspected common failure point warnings

title: Fresh-Roast Micro-batch Aggregator
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in tracking distinct flavor profiles from independent local roasters without shipping bloat
core_concept: Curated coffee subscription focused strictly on 48-hour roast freshness.
proposed_approach: A hyper-local subscription service that partners with three roasters to deliver beans roasted within 48 hours via a manual, fixed-route courier model.
prototype_scope: A manual subscription list for 20 local users, with a single courier picking up and delivering on a set day. | Secure commitment from 3 local roasters for specific roast days.; Recruit 20 local subscribers via email/social.; Execute 4 weekly delivery cycles using a manual spreadsheet for routing.

title: Technical Debt Resolution Tasking
problem_or_desire: Difficulty hiring fractional experts to debug one-off legacy code patches
core_concept: Micro-scope project matchmaking tailored strictly for specific framework codebases
proposed_approach: AI-moderated skill verification for legacy system languages to find precise specialist coders
prototype_scope: Manual pilot job-matching board restricted to three niche PHP and React bug-fixes

title: SEO Decay Alert System
problem_or_desire: Losing existing traffic revenue to un-indexed updates in Google search result pages
core_concept: Threshold alerts triggered by rank fluctuation, mapping back to specific page edit suggestions
proposed_approach: Lightweight wrapper over monitoring data that notifies creators exactly what snippet needs revision
prototype_scope: Plugin analyzing URLs via search metrics to provide alert-based revision suggestions

title: Legal Workflow Traffic Controller
problem_or_desire: Uncontrolled document version chaos across external law firms.
core_concept: Automated synchronization of shared folder structures managed by intelligent filing agents.
proposed_approach: The agent moves incoming files into designated folders based on metadata patterns and alerts if structural changes don't adhere to house style.
prototype_scope: Automated folder sorting agent interfacing exclusively with shared enterprise cloud document repositories.

title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
core_concept: Rapid-response repair service using modular swaps to minimize downtime.
proposed_approach: A repair service that stocks common replacement parts for popular machines to offer faster turnaround times than traditional vendors.
prototype_scope: A pilot repair service for 5 local cafes focusing on one common machine brand. | Identify 5 cafes using the same machine brand.; Stock common parts for that brand.; Offer a 24-hour repair guarantee for those cafes.

title: Remote Onboarding Video Library
problem_or_desire: Repetitive, time-consuming onboarding of new remote hires
core_concept: A library of high-quality, customizable video templates for company policies and tools
proposed_approach: Professional video production templates that companies can brand and host internally
prototype_scope: A set of three sample video templates hosted on a private video platform

title: Technical Debt Resolution Tasking
problem_or_desire: Difficulty hiring fractional experts to debug one-off legacy code patches
core_concept: Micro-scope project matchmaking for specific legacy codebases.
proposed_approach: A manual matchmaking service connecting solo founders with developers specialized in specific legacy frameworks for small bug fixes.
prototype_scope: A manual job board/matching service for 3 specific niche bug-fix projects. | Identify 3 niche legacy frameworks.; Find 3 developers per framework.; Match with 3 founders.; Monitor resolution success.

title: Corporate Wellness Vending
problem_or_desire: Employees struggle to find healthy snacks that align with their fitness goals.
core_concept: Smart vending machines that sync with employee fitness trackers to suggest snacks based on activity levels.
proposed_approach: Develop a machine that recognizes users via app and recommends snacks based on caloric needs.
prototype_scope: One machine in a single office building with 50 opt-in users.
